title: A7MD Adventures
body:
[![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2da38eb1ba4756119ca9ca511bc7872e8a0fae2f_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/frog) # ===1.21.1===**📜A7MD Adventures 🔍**===**v1.0**=== ### What does it offer? A7MD Adventures is the official modpack of the content creator [i1ia7md](https://www.twitch.tv/i1ia7md), used in all of his streams to make content creation easier without changing the vanilla experience. The modpack has a lot of helpful utility mods for single-player and multiplayer survival and creative building. It's built on Fabously Optimised to enhance performance and apply Optifine replacements for resource packs.
**All mods are client-side! (Works on multiplayer servers)** ### Features 📷 Content Creation 🎥: and expressive emotes to get those funny clips while streaming.
⚔️ Survival Utilities 🪓: Sorting, info HUDs, fast building, inventories tab, quickly swapping tools & items, and many more tools to help enhance your survival experience.
🏗️ Building 🧱: Axiom, and Litematica. mods to make your building much easier and focus on creativity.
ㅤㅤ ㅤ ㅤㅤㅤㅤ[![Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9129dad155fe0058b6e86381a326c2f4d2eb0057.png)](https://discord.gg/KWAuFxcM7z)[![Twitch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26b1e71a04c9252e192a0cd8c0d4defb02c37ea.png)](https://www.twitch.tv/i1a7mdxx)[![Instagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/068068cbfd4dda194a5e40cf0163939bda2c1985.png)](https://www.instagram.com/i1ia7md/)[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb2fd1630bca83b0edd57d08638dfb39b458a874.png)](https://www.modrinth.com/user/iA7MD)[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1462486b74f8ea66d92185d48d420fb12877bbcc.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@i1ia7md) # **Credits 📄**
